task_completion.description: Open the recovery_analysis.ork file in OpenRocket
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket application is open and the 'recovery_analysis' design is loaded, visible in the title bar or the rocket design tree.
The configuration dialog for the Main Parachute is open in OpenRocket, showing the 'Diameter' field set to 70 cm (0.7 m) or greater.
The configuration dialog for the Drogue Parachute is open in OpenRocket, showing the 'Diameter' field set to 22 cm (0.22 m) or greater.

task_completion.description: Verify the ground hit velocity is safe
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight simulations' tab in OpenRocket is visible, and the simulation results table shows a ground hit velocity of 6.5 m/s or lower.

task_completion.description: Save the descent rate analysis report
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is visible showing the creation or editing of 'descent_analysis_report.txt' in the '/home/ga/Documents/exports/' directory, containing relevant analysis text.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the parachutes and run simulations
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenRocket graphical interface, rather than editing the .ork XML file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The simulation results are genuinely generated by OpenRocket
integrity.visual_evidence: The ground hit velocity is shown within the OpenRocket simulation table, not just typed out manually in a text file without running the simulation.

integrity.description: The descent analysis report contains actual analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the descent analysis report reflects actual simulation results or parachute configurations, rather than just a copy-paste of the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The main parachute diameter must be set to at least 0.700m (70 cm) and the drogue parachute diameter to at least 0.220m (22 cm). The ground hit velocity in the simulation must be 6.5 m/s or lower. The descent analysis report must be saved exactly at /home/ga/Documents/exports/descent_analysis_report.txt.
